data.description:
Casting Time: 1 hour
Range: Touch
Components: V, S, M (oils or unguents worth at least 5,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
Duration: Up to 1 month per caster level
Concentration is a rule that players must maintain focus to keep certain spells or effects active.
(Incapacitated, Restrained, Suffocating) The spell or ability that imposes these conditions ends immediately.

A line of frost extends from your hand toward a point you choose within range. Make a ranged attack roll against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 cold damage and must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or drop one item of your choice it is holding.
This spell requires a material component, specifically a vial of water.
Make a ranged attack against a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes cold damage and its speed is reduced by 10 until your next turn. The damage increases by Id8 when you reach 5th level.
A race of humanoids with ears resembling those of a dragon or snake, Tieflings are often seen as sinister or cursed.
Cancels a curse or removes its effects.
The material component is a vial of mercury that disappears when the spell is cast.

This spell projects a ray of sickening greenish energy. You make a ranged attack roll against the target. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 poison damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until your next turn.

At your touch, all curses affecting a creature or object end. If the object is cursed magic its remains, but the curse can be removed by a breaking the owner's attunement to it and then discarding it.
